I suggested that last two-way contract spot

Should go to a center

Now, I said NBA experience

LA Clippers instead went with the tallest dude they could find -- and one I had my eye on when evaluating the 2024 NBA Draft...

items.title: When asked for clarification on what part of the leg the injury was to, Roberts said: “It was her left lower leg, is what I’ve been authorized to say. … That’s all I’ve been told to say.”
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: Kelsey Plum, who has not played in exactly one month, is OUT for tomorrow’s game. Plum’s re-evaluation date is coming up in a few days. Plum, who Sparks coach Lynne Roberts described as dealing with a “soft tissue injury,” is in the “build up stage” in her rehabilitation process.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Kelsey Plum, who has not played in exactly one month, is OUT for tomorrow’s game. Plum’s re-evaluation date is coming up in a few days. Plum, who Sparks coach Lynne Roberts described as dealing with a “soft tissue injury,” is in the “build up stage” in her rehabilitation process.
